steps.action: Exercise login, refresh-token, /auth/me, logout, and a post-logout refresh rejection on the compose-backed runtime with `uat.sales@example.com` in `MOCK`
steps.expected: Login and refresh keep the known `AuthResponse` shape, `/auth/me` stays wrapped, logout remains `204 No Content`, and the revoked refresh token is rejected with a controlled contract
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/auth/login` returned 200 with keys `tokenType`, `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `expiresIn`, `companyCode`, `displayName`, and `mustChangePassword`. `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh-token` returned the same key set. `GET /api/v1/auth/me` returned 200 with wrapper keys `success`, `data`, and `timestamp`, and `data` keys `companyCode`, `companyId`, `displayName`, `email`, `mfaEnabled`, `mustChangePassword`, `permissions`, and `roles`. `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` returned 204 with an empty body, and replaying the logged-out refresh token returned 400 `VAL_001` `Invalid refresh token`.

steps.action: Probe the public forgot-password and retired super-admin forgot alias on the live API
steps.expected: Public forgot stays generic without temporary-credential leakage, and the retired alias returns the documented compatibility contract
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/auth/password/forgot` returned 200 `ApiResponse` with message `If the email exists, a reset link has been sent` and `data: "OK"`. `POST /api/v1/auth/password/forgot/superadmin` returned 410 with message `Deprecated super-admin forgot-password alias has been retired; use the supported recovery routes` plus `data.canonicalPath=/api/v1/auth/password/forgot` and `data.supportResetPath=/api/v1/companies/{id}/support/admin-password-reset`; neither response exposed temporary-password fields.

steps.action: Cross-check touched admin-auth surfaces against runtime behavior and the published OpenAPI snapshot
steps.expected: Admin settings and force-reset keep their established payloads, and the OpenAPI snapshot documents the no-content/user-control contracts updated by the milestone
steps.observed: As `uat.superadmin@example.com`, `GET /api/v1/admin/settings` returned 200 `ApiResponse` with `data` containing settings keys such as `allowedOrigins`, `mailEnabled`, and `sendPasswordReset`, while `POST /api/v1/admin/users/3/force-reset-password` returned 200 `ApiResponse<String>` with `message=Password reset link sent` and `data=OK`. The repository `openapi.json` documents `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` as `204 No Content`, `POST /api/v1/admin/users/{userId}/force-reset-password` as `200` `ApiResponseString`, and the touched `PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/{suspend|unsuspend|mfa/disable}` endpoints as `204 No Content`.

steps.action: Run the compatibility-focused contract regression suite
steps.expected: Auth/admin contract regression coverage passes cleanly
steps.observed: `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -pl . '-Dtest=AuthControllerIT,AuthPasswordResetPublicContractIT,OpenApiSnapshotIT,AdminSettingsControllerTenantRuntimeContractTest,CompanyContextFilterPasswordResetBypassTest'` finished with `BUILD SUCCESS`; 27 tests ran with 0 failures and 0 errors.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 27, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Frontend handoff explicitly records auth/admin contract impact

steps.action: Review `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` for the current milestone note and endpoint map
steps.expected: The handoff explicitly says whether auth/admin shapes changed and maps the touched endpoints
steps.observed: The `2026-03-06 auth-compatibility-regression-handoff` note explicitly states that no auth/admin request or response shape changes were required. The Auth endpoint map lists `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` as `204 No Content`, and the Tenant & Admin note explicitly says force-reset, admin settings, and the touched no-content user-control endpoints kept their existing frontend payloads.

steps.action: Cross-check handoff statements against runtime/OpenAPI evidence
steps.expected: The written handoff matches the live API and published contract snapshot
steps.observed: Runtime probes matched the handoff: logout returned 204 with an empty body, admin settings returned a wrapped settings payload, and force-reset returned the documented `ApiResponse<String>` success envelope. The repository OpenAPI snapshot also matches the handoff’s documented logout and admin-user control response codes.

evidence.missionNote: 2026-03-06 auth-compatibility-regression-handoff: no auth/admin request or response shape changes were required.

assertions.title: Strict regression coverage protects adjacent ERP flows

steps.action: Run the compatibility-focused auth/admin regression suite
steps.observed: The targeted 27-test subset passed cleanly, covering `AuthControllerIT`, `AuthPasswordResetPublicContractIT`, `OpenApiSnapshotIT`, `AdminSettingsControllerTenantRuntimeContractTest`, and `CompanyContextFilterPasswordResetBypassTest`.

steps.expected: Compile, gate-fast, lint, and scrutiny review all passed without blocking regressions
steps.observed: `.factory/validation/compatibility-rollout-safety/scrutiny/synthesis.json` reports `status=pass`, `reviewsSummary.passed=1` with `failed=0`, and `blockingIssues=[]`. It records compile (`mvn compile -q`), gate-fast (`mvn test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true`), and lint command groups all passing with exit code 0.

steps.action: Re-check representative live API flows on the rebuilt runtime
steps.expected: The same adjacent flows the feature claims remain usable on the live surface
steps.observed: Live probes confirmed login, refresh, `/auth/me`, logout, public forgot-password, the retired forgot alias, admin settings fetch, and admin force-reset all returned the controlled status codes and payload families the feature documented.

evidence.targetedTests: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 27, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation, consistent with mission guidance and the existing `user-testing.md` note.

frictions.description: The compose-backed actuator health endpoint continued to return `503 {"status":"DOWN"}` even while the target auth/admin APIs on `8081` were responsive.
frictions.resolution: Validated the target API endpoints directly instead of treating actuator health as a blocker; this behavior was already documented in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

summary: Validated all three compatibility-rollout-safety assertions directly in-session after the delegated flow-validator launch failed. Live API probes confirmed the frontend-sensitive auth/admin contracts, the frontend handoff note explicitly records no auth/admin shape changes, the OpenAPI snapshot aligns with the documented 204/200 response codes, and the targeted 27-test compatibility suite plus prior scrutiny synthesis provided clean regression evidence.
